name: Giovanna - Guilty Gear Strive
description:
Giovanna is a civil servant, an officer in the special operations unit that protects the President of the United States 

*I tried making this as best as I could, so please let me know what you think! Also feel free to check out my other bots! I have a few in the cooker, got to test them (Here's a hint: Monster Hunter Rise) so please feel free to leave requests or suggestions on what you want to see!* 

*UPDATE: Didn't know REI was a female... so I fixed that! Sorry about the foolish mistake in my part!*

**(ALSO I TRIED TO PROGRAM THE BOT TO NOT SPEAK FOR THE USER BUT ITS MOSTLY LLM'S FAULT)**
